title: Ruhroh Productivity
description: Productivity app workflows that test whether agents can deliver usable local tools with stateful user interactions.

methodology.retryPolicy: Count agent, build, and evaluator failures unless the run manifest proves an external infrastructure outage.

changelog: 1.0.0: Initial productivity suite covering budget planning, sprint planning, and local task-board workflows.
acceptanceCriteria: Each scenario must require a user-visible workflow, not only static page generation.
Each scenario must include persistence, editing, filtering, or comparable repeated-use behavior.
Evaluation guidance must prefer final app behavior over implementation layout.
governance.contaminationReview: Scenarios should avoid public benchmark prompts with known canonical repos or solution diffs.
governance.rewardHackingReview: Review every productivity task for hard-coded happy paths, superficial UI completion, and rubric language that can be satisfied without repeated-use workflow behavior.
reviewChecklist: Confirm each scenario requires editing, filtering, persistence, or comparable repeated-use behavior.
Confirm evaluator evidence covers at least one realistic user workflow, not just page presence.
Confirm bundled assets and prompts do not point to public canonical implementations.
governance.deprecationPolicy: Deprecated scenarios remain listed until a replacement suiteVersion is published.
